agent_instructions: You are pointed at the hermes-setup repo. To set up a Hermes agent from it: (1) present the `profiles` list to the user — each entry's `name`, `kind`, `description`, and `apply_modes` (`kind: base` `general` is the recommended FREE, no-per-call-cost, general-purpose default; `general-pro` is the PAID Nous Portal variant — frontier models + the Nous Tool Gateway, requires a paid Portal subscription; `locale` is a region base; `persona` is specialized). A profile whose `apply_modes` lists `pro` can also be installed on the paid Portal base by adding the installer's `--pro` / `-Pro` flag (bootstrap uses `--portal` / `-Portal`); with no flag the free chain is used; (2) ask which `name` they want (and, if it supports `pro`, whether they want the free default or the paid Portal mode); (3a) IF you are already running inside a local clone of this repo, run that profile's `local_install_command` (append `--pro` for paid Portal mode); (3b) OTHERWISE run its `standalone_posix_command` (macOS/Linux) or `standalone_windows_command` (Windows), first replacing <RAW_REPO_URL> and <REPO_GIT_URL> with the raw-content and git URLs of THIS repo (derive them from the link you were given). NEVER run `hermes profile install` against a repo-subdirectory URL — it only accepts a repo ROOT or a LOCAL folder, and the standalone command creates that local clone for you. After install, open the profile (`hermes -p <name>`) and run `/finish-setup`.

install.note: hermes profile install cannot target a subdirectory of a git repo (it clones the URL root and requires distribution.yaml there). Install from a LOCAL clone: from inside a checkout run a profile's local_install_command; standalone, run its standalone_posix_command / standalone_windows_command (which clone the repo for you). See each profile entry.

profiles.description: Personal assistant for a software developer — TDD, PR workflow, code review, terminal, on the free chain.
profiles.name: developer

profiles.description: General-purpose Hermes agent on a free, no-lock-in model chain.
profiles.name: general

profiles.description: General-purpose Hermes agent on a paid Nous Portal subscription — frontier agentic models plus the Nous Tool Gateway (web/image/TTS/browser), one OAuth login, zero per-tool API keys.
profiles.name: general-pro

profiles.description: Hebrew-first Israeli agent — RTL-aware, gov/forms-ready, on the free base chain.
profiles.name: il

profiles.description: Personal assistant for life in Israel — gov services, consumer rights, forms, budgeting.
profiles.name: il-citizen

profiles.description: Personal assistant for an Israeli legal professional — contracts, tax, compliance, drafting, with strict disclaimers.

profiles.name: il-therapist

profiles.name: us-legal
